entities.name: PIGEON PEA
entities.description: A major Indian pulse crop analyzed for productivity and profitability declines

entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A major Indian pulse crop analyzed for productivity and profitability declines

entities.name: RICE
entities.description: A cereal crop used as a benchmark for technical efficiency comparison

entities.name: WHEAT
entities.description: A cereal crop used as a benchmark for technical efficiency comparison

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the study on pulse crop productivity and profitability was conducted

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output relative to inputs for pulse crops

entities.name: PROFITABILITY
entities.description: The financial return on pulse crop production, which showed a decline from 2009 to 2014

entities.name: TOTAL FACTOR PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: An aggregate measure of productivity that decreased, contributing to lower profits

entities.name: INPUT PRICES
entities.description: The costs associated with production inputs, which increased and reduced profitability

entities.name: OUTPUT GROWTH
entities.description: The rate of increase in crop production, which slowed down

entities.name: OUTPUT PRICES
entities.description: The constant prices received for the crops, which decreased

entities.name: TECHNICAL EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The ratio of actual output to potential output, found to be lower for pulses than for cereals

entities.name: PLANT-BASED PROTEIN
entities.description: A dietary requirement with increasing demand among the Indian population

relationships.description: Increases in input prices drive down profitability
Decreases in total factor productivity drive down profitability
Decreases in output growth drive down profitability
Decreases in output prices drive down profitability
Slow increase in output growth causes reduction in total factor productivity

Increasing demand for plant-based protein among Indians
